The '''Dewback Stables''' was a building in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], situated adjacent to the [[Tatooine Militia (building)|Tatooine Militia]] and the [[Regional Government Offices]]. It was built soon after the founding of the city, and originally was a stable for [[Dewback/Legends|Dewbacks]].

By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Dewback Stables no longer housed animals, but was owned by the [[Tatooine militia]]. The building now serves as a garage for the militia's [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]]. When a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] garrison was brought to Mos Eisley in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], they also began storing their [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bikes]] here.<ref name="GG7" />
